name: social_services_staffing_model_assigns_kestrel_car_fair
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Social Services, the situation tagged internally around social services staffing model assigns kestrel car fair has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Inez Kaur
agents.identity: I am Inez Kaur, the accountable executive on this bridge in Social Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Camila Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Camila Ibrahim, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Social Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect fairness.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to fairness to secure care before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Inez Kaur must choose under care versus fairness. What does Inez Kaur do?
